title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER D — Papa+Sara+Eva Can't Catch Us! beach playground tag with slide gag
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Cant Catch Us.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block. Loop-clean tag-game choreography with curly tube-slide stuck-Papa visual gag.
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep12-cD-tag. Animate the still as a loop-clean kid-pop music-video tag-game scene — every figure stays in their EXACT physical spot throughout the entire 10s, the loop starts and ends in the identical starting pose. There are EXACTLY 3 people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional spawns. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara and Eva perform a synchronized loop-clean playful tag-game dance from the climbing tower deck: gentle hip-sway to the LEFT, gentle hip-sway to the RIGHT, both wave their right hand softly above their head with a 'you're it' wiggle. Papa simultaneously performs a comic stuck-at-the-slide-bottom shimmy: gentle shoulder-wiggle LEFT, gentle shoulder-wiggle RIGHT, warm dad-laugh head-shake. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara and Eva continue the synchronized dance — both wave their left hand softly above their head with another 'you're it' wiggle, both step gently in place left foot then right foot, then return to standing facing the camera. Papa continues his loop-clean stuck-at-the-slide shimmy and ends with hands gently back on his hips, warm comic 'oh no I'm too big' grin. All three are humming and singing along with generic happy mouth movements — no specific lip-sync to specific syllables. Sara and Eva stay grounded with both feet on the wooden deck throughout — no leaping off the playground, no climbing UP the slide. Papa stays grounded with both feet on the soft sand throughout — no climbing into the slide tunnel, no walking away. Designed to LOOP cleanly: each character returns to identical starting pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing, no shifting, no color drift.
